from fastapi import FastAPI, Query
from sqlmodel import Session, SQLModel, Field, create_engine, select
from typing import Optional

app = FastAPI()
engine = create_engine("postgresql://user:pass@localhost/mydb")


class Item(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    name: str
    price: float


@app.get("/items")
def list_items(limit: int = Query(default=50, le=100), offset: int = 0):
    with Session(engine) as session:
        items = session.exec(select(Item).offset(offset).limit(limit)).all()
        return [{"id": i.id, "name": i.name, "price": i.price} for i in items]


@app.get("/users")
def list_users(limit: int = Query(default=50, le=100), offset: int = 0):
    with Session(engine) as session:
        from models import User
        users = session.exec(select(User).offset(offset).limit(limit)).all()
        return [{"id": u.id, "name": u.name} for u in users]


@app.get("/orders")
def list_orders(limit: int = Query(default=50, le=100), offset: int = 0):
    with Session(engine) as session:
        from models import Order
        orders = session.exec(select(Order).offset(offset).limit(limit)).all()
        return [{"id": o.id, "total": o.total} for o in orders]
